data/text/secret_power_tm.inc.Route111_Text_1A3520:
What's that?
What am I doing?\pI'm thinking about making my own room
here using a POKéMON move.\pI know! I'll give you this TM.
Will you use it to make your own room?
data/text/secret_power_tm.inc.Route111_Text_1A35C5:
Find a big tree that looks like it might
drop some vines.\pUse SECRET POWER in front of the tree.
Some vines should get free and drop\ldown, so you can climb the tree.\pYou'll find a lot of space for putting
your favorite things.\pIt'll be your own secret room...
A SECRET BASE!\pYou should make one, too.\pAnother thing, you don't always have
to make your SECRET BASE in a tree.\pTry using SECRET POWER on rock walls
that have small indents in them.\pI'm going to look for other places, too.
Okay, bye!
data/text/secret_power_tm.inc.Route111_Text_1A37B5: Oh, you don't want this?\nIf you change your mind, tell me, okay?
data/text/secret_power_tm.inc.Route111_Text_1A37F6: Oh, you don't have any room for this.\pI'll hold on to it, so come back for it\nanother time, okay?
